Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates a diagnosis of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia." This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition has been explicitly diagnosed during the current visit, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit as well. The presence of this diagnosis suggests ongoing management or monitoring of the lipid disorder, reinforcing the likelihood of it being recognized in future visits.
